Overall, the classification of Oligosporus wellbyi reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in this group.

intro: Oligosporus wellbyi, also known as Wellby's plant or Wellby's grass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. Traditionally, Oligosporus wellbyi is used to promote overall health and well-being due to its purported benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, terpenoids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
